clause_text: Tenant acknowledges that the following limitation shall benefit Tenant. Operating Costs for calendar year 2019 shall be capped such that Controllable Operating Costs may not increase by more than 2% over the prior year on a non-cumulative basis, excluding utilities separately metered to tenants. This clause is labelled synthetic corpus variant 1 for retrieval benchmarking and shall not be construed as legal advice.

Landlord shall retain the protections described below for Landlord's benefit. Operating Costs for calendar year 2020 shall be capped such that Controllable Operating Costs may not increase by more than 3% over the prior year on a cumulative basis, excluding utilities separately metered to tenants. This clause is labelled synthetic corpus variant 2 for retrieval benchmarking and shall not be construed as legal advice.
